summary: Implemented the Muno itinerary-planner playbook, prompts, canonical widget examples, docs, register helper, smoke helper, and muno-local memory. The feature landed through muno PR #1 and was merged to main.
ai_meta_submodule_pointer_bump_sha: included in local ai-meta pointer commit

extraction.notes: Extraction prompt and Python fallback both emit {slot_updates, tool_requests, render_intent}; Miami/free-form path extracts region, dates, and party.

dispatch.notes: Workflow dispatches through mcp/firestore, mcp/google-places, mcp/duffel, and mcp/amadeus. Full live GKE smoke deferred to the registration/deployment round.

widget_chat.notes: Generated widget examples validate via npm run smoke:widgets.

end_to_end.notes: scripts/itinerary_agent_smoke.sh added for live NoETL execution once the playbook is registered.

replay.notes: Replay fixture path documented as chat_threads/{thread_id}/api_calls/{call_id}; live replay smoke deferred until registered tool execution is available.

replay_drift_metrics.policy: slot_updates and widget_type sequence must be stable; chat wording drift tolerated

verdict: GREEN for repository implementation and static validation; live NoETL/GKE registration smoke remains the next deployment step.
